name: 800G / 1.6T pluggable transceivers
description: Pluggable optical transceivers at 800G (8×100G PAM4) and 1.6T (8×200G PAM4 or 16×100G) carry rack-to-rack and spine traffic in AI datacenter fabrics. Every additional GPU adds non-linear demand for fiber lanes; transceiver units per accelerator are climbing faster than total accelerator units.
stackPosition: InP wafer → epi → EML/DFB laser die (Coherent, Lumentum, MACOM) → laser TO-can assembly → driver/TIA ASIC integration (Semtech, Macom, Marvell) → optical sub-assembly → pluggable transceiver build (Innolight, Eoptolink, Coherent, Accelink) → qualification at NVIDIA/Broadcom/Arista → ship to hyperscaler. The 1.6T transition centers on 200G/lane PAM4 EMLs at the wafer end and DSP at the silicon end.

indicators.name: Innolight + Eoptolink revenue and 1.6T mix commentary
Coherent + Lumentum datacom segment + EML capacity
LightCounting transceiver forecast by speed and form factor
NVIDIA Spectrum-X + Quantum-X switch refresh cycles
OFC / ECOC 1.6T product demonstrations and qualifications

companies.name: Coherent
companies.note: Vertically integrated; owns wafer + epi + device + module

companies.name: Lumentum
companies.note: EML capacity expansion; 1.6T ramp is the upside

companies.name: Innolight
companies.note: Largest transceiver vendor globally; A-share liquidity

companies.name: Eoptolink
companies.note: Fast-grower in 800G+; smaller share but high attach to NVIDIA

insight: Transceivers are the cleanest 'tax' on AI compute growth — every accelerator shipped adds 4-8 optics modules, and the per-accelerator optics dollar content is climbing as 1.6T adoption accelerates. The investable wedges are Coherent for vertical integration, Lumentum for EML pure-play, and (for those willing to take A-share risk) Innolight as the volume leader. The widow-maker is misjudging the CPO-vs-pluggables timing: pluggables remain dominant well past consensus expectations, but a 2027-2028 inflection toward co-packaged optics is real and would re-rate the module makers down.

debates.question: Does 1.6T pluggable shipment volume exceed 5M units in 2027?
debates.currentBelief: On track; Innolight + Coherent capacity ramps suggest 5-7M plausible

debates.question: Do Chinese vendors gain US-hyperscaler share in 800G/1.6T despite export-control noise?
debates.currentBelief: Innolight + Eoptolink already qualified at NVIDIA; share gains likely absent escalating restrictions
